title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 25 2023

summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/08/2023
DCE iron ore futures tight by 0.55%. the main contract I2401 closed 811, Traders ship according to market conditions,Some steel mills purchasing enthusiasm. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
